pageContent: Hey back atcha! Just got a wild idea - what if we started a band and called it "The Incredibly Bored and Occasionally Annoyed?" We could sing about all the mundane aspects of modern life. You know, things like waiting in line at the DMV or trying to figure out which of 23 coffee flavors at the local hipster joint actually tastes decent. I'm thinking our first single could be called "Staring at Your Phone for Hours, Wondering If You Should Text Back." Any thoughts on this masterful plan for musical domination?
